description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a casual urban appearance. She is wearing a fitted tank top and slim jeans, accessorized with a utility belt and holster on her right thigh, and a bracelet on her left wrist. Her footwear consists of tall, lace-up boots that reach just below the knee, adding a rugged touch to her outfit. Her hair is styled in a short, wavy bob that frames her face and neck. The figure's posture is upright and relaxed, with arms naturally at her sides. Visible details include realistic body proportions, defined facial features, and subtle accessories that suggest readiness for practical urban activities.
description: A casually dressed adult woman stands upright, wearing a tank top, jeans, utility belt, and tall lace-up boots, with short wavy hair and a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tank top, utility belt, holster, bracelet, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the holster, and the contour of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tank top, jeans, belt, and the full length of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the arm, bracelet, and the side profile of the holster and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: casual tank top and slim jeans with a utility belt and holster, accessorized with a bracelet
